fix_hints: Write the standard-uncertainty suffix as <number>(<digits>), e.g. 12.34(5).
Remove stray characters or extra parenthesised groups after the numeric value.
message_template: Numeric value '<value>' has a malformed standard-uncertainty suffix.

occurrences.message: Numeric value '12.34(ab)' has a malformed standard-uncertainty suffix.
Numeric value '12.34(5.6)' has a malformed standard-uncertainty suffix.
Numeric value '12.34()' has a malformed standard-uncertainty suffix.
Numeric value '1.2(3)x' has a malformed standard-uncertainty suffix.
